no: Known issue: cn values in database may be off by +1 (tp2 has no DESIGNATED, auto-numbers from 0). Needs verification. Hidden Adventures WhiteAgnus' original: Jastey's updated fork:
sum: Adds 10 hidden quest chains to BG2 that trigger naturally through exploration. New dungeons, NPCs, and storylines woven into existing areas.

co.no: Extends Lady Elgea ransom quest with new dialogue options and outcomes

Installs SEPARATELY from other HA components — after Ajantis BG2, NPC Tweak, ItemUpgrade. EET guide specifies 'everything but Anomen' in the first batch, Anomen in a later position. The cat override ensures it exports at the correct later position. CRITICAL: cn:1 must NOT appear in the first batch's --force-install list, or WeiDU triggers a reinstall chain that wipes Ascension (FORBID_COMPONENT spell_rev blocks re-install). The first batch should be cn:0,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10 only.
Adds ore shop in Waukeen Promenade for buying smithing materials

co.n: Elven holy water in the Temple of Lathander
co.tp2n: Elfisches heiliges Wasser im Lathander Tempel
co.no: must go after A77's Golem Construction
Restores Wave Blade in the De'Arnise Treasury. Safe
Adds Silver Dagger findable in Irenicus Dungeon. Useful for early vampires

co.n: Bards can spend the night at their stronghold (Five Flagons)
co.no: Lets bards rest at Five Flagons stronghold. QoL for bard players

co.n: A bard for the bard stronghold
co.no: Adds a joinable bard NPC to the Five Flagons. Minor content addition
Should go after item revision mods?

co.n: Temple of Mask in Docks District
co.no: Restores Temple of Mask in Docks. Adds thief-flavored temple services

advisories.reason: HA cn:9 (Tunnel for Saradush) uses EXTEND_TOP on SPSEQ12A.bcs (gives scroll to yssold14). SCS cn:6030 (Smarter Mages) may rewrite SPSEQ12A.bcs entirely as part of mage AI overhaul, wiping HA's addition. Quest dialog (25SPELL/SARTEM01) unaffected. Scroll may not auto-spawn but quest still completable. Original conflict listing (SCS 1500/1510/2000/2010/2050) was WRONG — spell components don't touch this script.
advisories.source: tp2 analysis: HA extends SPSEQ12A.bcs; SCS 6030 rewrites mage AI scripts including SPSEQ12A
